lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Prabhaatee, Ashtpadheeyaa, First Mehl, Bibhaas:
In false greed, life is wasting away.
The insanity of duality has driven the mind insane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਪਟਿ ਰਹੀ ਫੁਨਿ ਬੰਧੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: lapatt rahee fun bandh na paaeaa |
lines.english: Duality clings to the mind; it cannot be restrained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naa man marai na maaeaa marai |
lines.english: Without subduing the mind, Maya cannot be subdued.
The True Guru saves us, implanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਭਉ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin kichh keea soee jaanai sabad veechaar bhau saagar tarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The One who created this, He alone understands. Contemplating the Word of the Shabad, one is carried across the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Gathering the wealth of Maya, kings become proud and arrogant.
But this Maya that they love so much shall not go along with them in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਪਰ ਮਨੁ ਤੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau man dekheh par man taisaa |
lines.english: According to one's own mind, one sees the minds of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਸੰਗੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ko saath na sangee |2|
lines.english: Except for the Name, no one has any friend or companion. ||2||
There are so many colors and flavors of attachment to Maya.
Seeking the advice of the True Guru, one finds the home of peace and poise. ||3||
According to one's desires, one's condition is determined.
According to one's actions, one is focused and tuned in.
Filled with deception deep within, one suffers in terrible pain.
Meeting with the True Guru, one is blessed with clear understanding,
and remains lovingly attuned to the True Name. ||4||
In music and song, the mind is caught by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਅਮਰ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaas amar pad paavai |
lines.english: He dwells in the home of his own heart deep within, and obtains the immortal status.
He sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, through the True Word of His Bani.
Through the True Word of the Shabad, one practices Truth.
even though one may make all sorts of efforts.
Then, he is blessed with honor in the Court of the True Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa bin bhagat na hoee |
lines.english: Without serving the Guru, there is no devotional worship,
If one eradicates egotism and selfishness through the Shabad,
Without the Shabad, everything else is the darkness of emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh sabad karanee hai saar |
lines.english: In this world, the practice of the Shabad is the most excellent occupation.
the Immaculate Naam comes to abide in the mind. ||6||
There is no other Creator except the All-seeing Lord God.
Through the Shabad, the Naam is enshrined within the heart.
Through the Shabad, one obtains clear understanding and the door of salvation. ||7||
Through the Lord's Name, one obtains the most sublime and exalted state.
The True Lord Himself is Infinite and Incomparably Beautiful.
O Nanak, how rare are those humble beings, who seek and find the Lord. ||8||1||
Seeing a beautiful woman, the man is overcome with sexual desire.
Prabhaatee, First Mehl:
Emotional attachment to Maya is spread out all over the world.
His love for his children and gold steadily increases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਇਕੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh apanaa ik raam paraaeaa |1|
lines.english: He sees everything as his own, but he does not own the One Lord. ||1||
I meditate as I chant on such a mala,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh parahar bhagat niraalee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that I rise above pleasure and pain; I attain the most wondrous devotional worship of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Through the True Word of the Shabad, I am absorbed into You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan teraa ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: O Treasure of Virtue, Your limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਭਗਤ ਜਿਨ ਸਚਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: seee bhagat jin sach chit laaeaa |2|
lines.english: They alone are devotees, who focus their consciousness on You. ||2||
You Yourself created the comings and goings of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette koe na jaanee |
lines.english: - without meeting the True Guru, no one knows this.
The Lord's Light fills the sacred pools of all beings.
Spiritual wisdom and meditation on the Lord, the Lord of Nirvaanaa
I am a sacrifice to the Embodiment of Bliss. ||3||
Through the Guru's Teachings, one achieves loving devotional worship.
The Shabad burns away egotism from within.
